name: CLX - MGA Insurance Advisor Onboarding Start v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. mga_principal session required. Creates auth_users + advisor_onboarding row, sends welcome email with onboarding portal link. vertical_id='insurance'.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ email: $json.email, full_name: $json.full_name, phone: $json.phone, user_role: 'advisor', client_id: $json.client_id, status: 'pending_onboarding', created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.name: Create Advisor User
nodes.notes: Insert with merge-duplicates so re-running with same email returns existing row instead of erroring. UNIQUE(email) on auth_users assumed.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', advisor_id: $json.advisor_id, mga_principal_id: $json.mga_principal_id, status: 'in_progress', steps_completed: { account_created: true, license_uploaded: false, eo_uploaded: false, background_check: false, training: false, contract_signed: false }, application_data: { jurisdiction: $json.jurisdiction, full_name: $json.full_name }, started_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, template: 'welcome', to: $('Carry IDs').item.json.advisor_email, vars: { first_name: ($('Carry IDs').item.json.full_name || 'there').split(' ')[0], message: 'Welcome to Crystallux Insurance MGA. Your onboarding portal is ready. Complete the steps: license upload, E&O proof, background check authorization, training, and MGA contract signature.', landing_url: 'https://app.crystallux.org/insurance-mga/onboarding/' + $('Carry IDs').item.json.advisor_id } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: 'advisor_onboarding_started', advisor_id: $('Carry IDs').item.json.advisor_id, performed_by_user_id: $('Carry IDs').item.json.mga_principal_id, performed_by_role: 'mga_principal', event_data: { advisor_email: $('Carry IDs').item.json.advisor_email, jurisdiction: $('Carry IDs').item.json.jurisdiction }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const ins = $('Insert Onboarding').item.json; const row = Array.isArray(ins) ? ins[0] : ins; return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', advisor_id: $('Carry IDs').item.json.advisor_id, onboarding_id: row && row.id }); })() }}
